name: create_list
description: Create a new list in a ClickUp folder or directly in a space (folderless list). Lists are containers for tasks and represent a project, sprint, or category. You can set the list name, content description, priority, assignee, and status to indicate the default status for new tasks.

parameters.name: folder_id
parameters.description: The ID of the folder to create the list in. For folderless lists, use the endpoint /api/v2/space/{space_id}/list instead.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Description or content for the list.
parameters.example: Backend tasks for Sprint 12 including API refactoring and database migration.

parameters.name: due_date
parameters.description: Due date as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Priority level: 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Normal, 4 = Low.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User ID to assign as the list owner.

body.name: Sprint 12 - Backend
body.content: Backend tasks for Sprint 12 including API refactoring and database migration.

body.name: Sprint 12 - Backend
body.content: Backend tasks for Sprint 12 including API refactoring and database migration.
